title: Twist Bioscience Full Year 2024 Earnings: EPS Misses Expectations
text: Twist Bioscience reported its fiscal year 2024 results showing mixed performance. The company achieved revenue of $313.0 million, representing a 28% increase from the previous year. However, the biotech firm's profitability challenges persisted, with a net loss of $208.7 million that slightly widened from 2023. The earnings per share came in at a loss of $3.60, missing analyst expectations by 4.1%. Despite the revenue growth meeting estimates, the deteriorating EPS represents a concern for investors. Revenue was driven primarily by the Americas segment, which contributed $193.9 million (62% of total revenue). Cost of sales totaled $193.6 million at 57% of revenue, while general and administrative expenses reached $213.2 million. Looking forward, the company faces headwinds relative to its industry peers. Revenue is forecast to grow 15% p.a. on average during the next 3 years, compared to a 21% growth forecast for the Biotechs industry in the US. Following the earnings announcement, TWST shares declined 2.8% over the week.
